summary: D'CLIC PRO Dark Theme Redesign - All features tested and working. Dark navy background (#1e3a5f), glassmorphic cards, gradient buttons (blue to green), D'CLIC PRO SVG logo, 26 questions with 64 unique images (no duplicates), 9 results sections including Carte d'Identité Pro.
critical_code_review_comments: Dark theme correctly implemented with #1e3a5f background (rgb(30, 58, 95))
D'CLIC PRO SVG logo displays correctly with gradient colors
Glassmorphic cards with backdrop-blur and border-white/10
All 26 questions have unique Pexels image URLs (64 total images, 0 duplicates)
Results page has 9 navigation sections as required
Carte d'Identité Pro shows 4 quadrants (Identité Personnelle, Professionnelle, Sociale, Profonde)
Access code format XXXX-XXXX correctly generated and displayed with copy button
Dashboard button navigates correctly (to landing page for unauthenticated users)
test_credentials: No credentials needed - test creates dynamic data
seed_data_creation: D'CLIC results stored in dclic_results collection with access codes
context_for_next_testing_agent: D'CLIC PRO dark theme redesign fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) Dark navy background #1e3a5f, 2) D'CLIC PRO SVG logo, 3) Glassmorphic cards, 4) Gradient buttons, 5) 26 questions with 64 unique images (no duplicates), 6) Results page with 9 sections, 7) Carte d'Identité Pro with 4 quadrants. All backend APIs working: GET /api/dclic/questionnaire, POST /api/dclic/submit, POST /api/dclic/retrieve.
